titlestmt.titleproper: American Baptist Foreign Mission Society records4424
titlestmt.author: Compiled by M.E. Warren

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-01-01 00:07:31 +0000.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: American Baptist Foreign Mission Society records
did.abstract: Missionary correspondence (1817-1900) and geographic files relating to activities of the American Baptist Foreign Mission Society in Burma.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Missionary correspondence (1817-1900) and geographic files relating to activities of the American Baptist Foreign Mission Society in Burma.

altformavail.head: Available Copies:
altformavail.p: Originals at American Baptist Historical Society, 3001 Mercer University Drive, Atlanta, GA 30341.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: American Baptist Foreign Mission Society records, #4424. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: Reproductions cannot be made from this collection. Please contact the American Baptist Historical Society at abhs@abhsarchives.org.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: For permission to publish contact: American Baptist Historical Society, 3001 Mercer University Drive, Atlanta, GA 30341.
